summary: #86393 remains the live issue canonical for the narrow /btw post-compaction checkpoint transcript lookup bug. #86730 is the focused open PR candidate for that canonical issue, but merge is blocked by job policy and no merge preflight is emitted. #88902 and #90925 are related Codex/OAuth routing and announce-compaction failures with distinct reproduction paths, so they should stay open rather than be deduped into #86393.

actions.reason: Best live issue canonical for the specific /btw parent-thread lookup after compaction checkpoints.
Focused candidate fix for the canonical issue, but merge is not an allowed action in this plan-mode job.
Related Codex /btw auth-routing regression with a distinct /new and legacy OAuth configuration path; not safe to close as a duplicate of #86393.
Related but materially different root cause and scope; keep open for its own maintainer-reviewed fix path.
